## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No unrelated files changed.
- [ ] No production settings changed.
- [ ] No secrets displayed or committed.
- [ ] No service role key or server secret in frontend bundle.
- [ ] `.env` and `.env.staging` were not staged.
- [ ] No force push.
- [ ] `src/routeTree.gen.ts` was restored if it changed only from build generation.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build` passed.
- [ ] `dist/client` secret scan passed.
- [ ] Git diff reviewed.
- [ ] Staging verified, if needed.
- [ ] Production verified, if published.
